compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect CI-enforced quality gates
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Update existing project documentation to reflect the new CI enforcement system.
**Why**: Future agents and developers need accurate documentation about the CI pipeline, Ruleset configuration, and onboarding changes.
**Scope**:
- IN: Update CLAUDE.md (architecture section, quick reference, config keys), update dso-config.conf documentation for new CI-related keys, update KNOWN-ISSUES.md if any known limitations are discovered during implementation
- OUT: Creating new documentation files, documenting Epic B changes (local hook removal)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md accurately describes the CI pipeline structure, Ruleset enforcement, and onboarding GitHub configuration steps
  ← Satisfies: all epic criteria (documentation accuracy)
- When this story is complete, dso-config.conf documents any new config keys added for CI workflow naming and status check configuration

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Escalate to the user whenever you do not have high confidence in your understanding of the work, approach, or intent. "High confidence" means clear evidence from the codebase or ticket context — not inference or reasonable assumption. When in doubt, stop and ask rather than guess.

comments.body: Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for documentation formatting, structure, and conventions.
comments.author: Test
